news.headline: MMV partners with Zhao Mingwei and Li Yuanfeng to establish a Bitcoin investment company in Hong Kong.
news.summary: In Shanghai on December 3, 2024, MultiMetaVerse Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: MMV), a prominent animation and entertainment company catering to young consumers in China, disclosed a partnership deal with Zhao Mingwei (also known as "Big Bear") and Li Yuanfeng. The collaboration aims to establish a joint venture in Hong Kong, with a focus on utilizing their combined resources for Bitcoin and Bitcoin mining machines.

news.headline: Hutchmed and Innovent receive conditional approval for ELUNATE (fruquintinib) + TYVYT (sintilimab) for endometrial cancer.
news.summary: The combination therapy of fruquintinib with an immune checkpoint inhibitor has received its initial regulatory approval. This innovative treatment approach aims to enhance the effectiveness of existing cancer therapies. Fruquintinib, in conjunction with the immune checkpoint inhibitor, has shown promising results in clinical studies. This approval marks a significant milestone in the fight against cancer, providing new hope for patients. The specific details regarding the approval process, such as the regulatory body involved and the exact combination of drugs, were not provided. Nonetheless, the approval signifies a step forward in advancing treatment options for cancer patients.

news.headline: Medigene receives $1 million milestone payment from Regeneron for MAGE-A4-TCR program, part of acquisition of 2seventy bio Inc.'s pipeline.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Medigene AG, a company specializing in oncology research and development of T cell receptor (TCR)-guided therapies for cancer, disclosed a significant development. They received a milestone payment of USD $1 million from Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. This payment was initiated due to a recent achievement in a trial conducted in China by JW Therapeutics, a previous partner of 2seventy bio Inc. Regeneron acquired the MAGE-A4-TCR program as part of their procurement of 2seventy bio Inc.’s oncology and autoimmune cell therapy pipeline earlier in April 2024. Regeneron's MAGE-A4 cell therapy, which integrates a TCR engineered by Medigene to target MAGE-A4, was the focal point of the trial.

news.headline: Fortuna Mining Corp. repurchased 6,402,640 common shares at $4.77/share, totaling $30,529,066 in Q4 2024, reaching 41.88% of authorized shares.
news.summary: Fortuna Mining Corp., trading on NYSE as FSM and TSX as FVI, announced on December 3, 2024, that in the fourth quarter up to November 29, they repurchased 6,402,640 common shares through their NCIB. These shares were bought on the New York Stock Exchange at an average price of $4.77 per share, amounting to a total of $30,529,066 before brokerage fees, and will be eliminated. This represents 41.88% of the 15,287,201 shares approved for repurchase under the NCIB. For more details, refer to their press release from April 30, 2024.

news.headline: Internet Society of China: the US chip export controls have caused substantial harm to the healthy and stable development of China's internet industry.
Analyst predicts potential Bitcoin surge despite pullback worries. Influencers predict dip below $90,000, ruling out $100,000 breach in 2024. High volume of “BTC pullback” mentions on social media.
news.summary: On Monday, a prominent cryptocurrency analyst expressed optimism amidst concerns of a significant Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) pullback. Ali Martinez, recognized for predicting price movements, highlighted forecasts by popular analysts Sheldon The Sniper and Tone Vays, who predicted a drop in Bitcoin’s price below $90,000. Vays specifically dismissed the possibility of Bitcoin surpassing $100,000 by 2024. Martinez revealed a notable increase in discussions regarding a potential BTC pullback on social media, as per data from on-chain analytics firm Santiment. Despite prevailing bearish sentiments, Martinez remained hopeful for a potential surge in the coming days.

news.headline: Internet society of China calls on domestic companies to carefully consider the procurement of US chips and seek to expand cooperation with chip companies from other countries and regions.
Patrik Tolf resigns as CFO of Vitrolife Group, replaced by Helena Wennerström as acting CFO. #Gothenburg #Sweden
news.summary: In a press release from Gothenburg, Sweden on December 3, 2024, Vitrolife AB (publ) revealed that Patrik Tolf will be resigning from his position as Chief Financial Officer for personal reasons. Taking over as the acting CFO will be Helena Wennerström, who brings with her a wealth of experience in finance and business.

news.headline: China bans exports of gallium, germanium and antimony to US.
InventisBio reports positive Phase 2 results for D-2570 (TYK2 Inhibitor) in psoriasis patients, achieving skin clearance like top biologics.
news.summary: In Shanghai on December 3, 2024, InventisBio Co., Ltd. revealed positive outcomes from a Phase 2 clinical trial of D-2570. The trial showed strong effectiveness and safety, with skin clearance similar to top biologics. This oral selective treatment displayed robust efficacy, suggesting promising potential in comparison to leading alternatives.

news.headline: Alm. Brand executives and their related parties report trading of Alm. Brand A/S shares per latest data. #executivetrading #stocks
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.2%. The data also shows that the number of employed individuals has increased by 250,000, reaching a total of 5.7 million. This improvement in the job market has been attributed to various economic factors and government initiatives aimed at stimulating growth and creating more opportunities for workers. Experts believe that the positive trend is likely to continue in the coming months, offering hope for both job seekers and employers.

news.headline: Yield spread between French and German bonds hits a 12-year peak ahead of crucial government vote.
Chinese wind companies are targeting emerging markets abroad for growth opportunities.
FINEOS launches Partner Hub for insurance carriers, offering curated selection of plug-and-play partners to enhance customer experience.
news.summary: Atlanta-based FINEOS Corporation Ltd (ASX:FCL), a top player in digital benefits and insurance tech, has unveiled the FINEOS Partner Hub. This new platform showcases a range of reliable partners that complement the FINEOS Platform, enriching the customer journey. Partner services are aimed at boosting a carrier’s benefits service provision, offering tailored solutions for clients throughout the entire benefits process.

news.headline: Chinese Tesla deliveries decrease once more, as anticipation grows for a strong quarter ahead.
XRP slashes reserve requirement by 90%, enabling new wallets with just $2.56.
news.summary: The XRP Ledger has decided to decrease its reserve requirement from 10 XRP to 1 XRP, enabling users to now fund their wallets with as low as $2.56.

news.headline: Highly attractive interest deal in Japan with low rates has been canceled abruptly.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the country's GDP growth rate for the last quarter has risen to 6.2%, surpassing the initial estimate of 5.8%. This increase marks a significant improvement compared to the same period last year when the growth rate was at 4.5%. The GDP growth rate for the entire fiscal year is now projected to be around 5.9%, showing a positive trend in the country's economic performance. Additionally, the unemployment rate has dropped to 3.9%, down from 4.5% in the previous quarter. This decrease reflects an improving job market and a growing economy. The government has also announced a new stimulus package of $10 billion aimed at boosting various sectors such as manufacturing, infrastructure, and technology. This injection of funds is expected to further propel economic growth and create more employment opportunities for the citizens. Overall, these latest indicators suggest a promising outlook for the country's economy in the coming months.

news.headline: NATO Chief Ruttew: Ukraine is entering a crucial winter and Russia's aggression shows no sign of abating.
Appian unveils latest platform release to scale workflows and increase efficiency with AI, released on Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 3, 2024, Appian (Stock Symbol: APPN) revealed its new platform update aimed at improving high-volume workflows by harnessing the power of artificial intelligence (AI). This enhancement is expected to boost efficiency and streamline analysis processes for organizations. The release showcases Appian's commitment to assisting companies in developing innovative solutions for their operations.

news.headline: CRISALION Mobility selects IFS Cloud for Advanced Air Mobility Project, meeting global demand for scaled-down eVTOL aircraft.
news.summary: IFS Cloud recently announced its collaboration with a prominent Advanced Air Mobility manufacturer to enhance regulatory, design, and manufacturing processes. The partnership aims to support the increasing worldwide interest in a smaller edition of its popular Electric Vertical Takeoff and Landing (eVTOL) aircraft and remote vehicles. The collaboration, which was revealed in London on December 3, 2024, is expected to cater to the rising demand for these advanced mobility solutions.

news.headline: VTT's new origami packaging tech with Aalto Univ creates sustainable lightweight, durable packing materials. Finland, Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: In Espoo, Finland, on December 3, 2024, VTT Technical Research Centre of Finland, along with Aalto University and Finnish industrial partners, announced the advancement of a novel technology for forming cardboard in a distinctive continuous method. This innovation allows for the creation of reel-to-reel origami-inspired products.

news.headline: France to examine no-confidence motion at 16:00 CET on December 4th - BFM
Coinbase will cut ties with firms employing ex-SEC staff critical of crypto, as with Milbank and Gurbir Grewal: CEO.
news.summary: The CEO of Coinbase, Brian Armstrong, disclosed that the exchange halted its collaboration with law firm Milbank due to its recruitment of ex-SEC official Gurbir Grewal.

news.headline: 2024 Understanding China Conference in Guangzhou gathers leaders to discuss Chinese modernization and global opportunities on Dec 2-4.
news.summary: The city of Guangzhou in China is hosting the 2024 Understanding China Conference, scheduled from December 2 to 4. The event has attracted a diverse range of attendees, including political figures, academics, corporate leaders, and delegates from international organizations. The conference aims to delve into the theme of "Carry Through" and facilitate discussions on various aspects of Chinese society and global relations.

news.headline: Notice about Director/Person Discharging Managerial Responsibilities (PDMR) notification.
Equity allocation and voting rights update: (Numbers not provided)
Ryp Labs wins Lineage's 2024 Global Food Chain Innovation Challenge.
news.summary: In Novi, Michigan, Lineage recently revealed the champion of its 2024 Food Chain Innovation Challenge as Ryp Labs.

news.headline: Hisense's PX3-PRO wins top spot at Projector Showdown, demonstrating excellence in Laser Projector tech.
news.summary: In Qingdao, China, on December 3, 2024, Hisense, a prominent global brand in consumer electronics and home appliances, showcased its dominance in Laser Projector technology. The Hisense PX3-PRO TriChroma Laser Projector emerged as the winner of the Prestigious Projector Showdown competition. This recognition solidifies Hisense's position as a leader in the industry, highlighting the innovative features and quality of the PX3-PRO model. The event highlighted the projector's cutting-edge technology and exceptional performance, setting it apart from competitors. Hisense's success in this competition showcases its continued commitment to delivering top-notch products to consumers worldwide.

news.headline: French mobile operators Bouygues Telecom, Free, Orange, SFR to offer 2 network APIs to fight fraud. GSMA Open Gateway initiative.
news.summary: In Paris on December 3, 2024, four top mobile operators in France, Bouygues Telecom, Free, Orange, and SFR, announced their collaboration in offering two network APIs to aid online businesses in fighting fraud and protecting against digital identity theft. This initiative is part of the GSMA Open Gateway program, a global effort.

news.headline: Neo Space Group acquires UP42 from Airbus to expand geospatial capabilities, supporting global markets & Saudi Vision 2030.
news.summary: After obtaining necessary regulatory approvals and finalizing the deal, UP42 will merge with the NSG Geospatial division, allowing PIF's NSG to enhance its geospatial offerings. This acquisition will strengthen NSG's capabilities to cater to international markets and meet the increasing need for advanced Earth Observation (EO) and geospatial solutions in Saudi Arabia. The move aligns with Saudi Vision 2030 and aims to address the rising demand for cutting-edge geospatial technology.

news.headline: Zensai wins World Future Award 2024 for Best AI-Powered Learning and Performance SaaS. Integrated in Microsoft 365.
news.summary: In AARHUS, Denmark on December 3, 2024, Zensai, the sole AI-driven platform for learning, employee engagement, and performance management on Azure, seamlessly connected with Microsoft 365 and Teams, has received the prestigious World Future Award 2024 recognizing its excellence in the Best category. This recognition underscores Zensai's dedication to innovative technologies and its impact on the future of work.

news.headline: Veritonic improves video podcast strategies with advanced audio analysis for better performance.
news.summary: Veritonic, a company based in New York, has recently revealed upgraded features to better assess and refine the audio quality of video podcasts. These enhancements aim to provide creators with improved tools for analyzing and enhancing their content. The updates are specifically tailored to optimize the audio performance of podcasts for a better overall experience. The move signifies Veritonic's commitment to supporting podcast creators in delivering high-quality audio to their audiences. The news highlights the importance of audio measurement in podcast production.

news.headline: Climate X report predicts $800 million in losses for FIFA World Cup venues by 2050 due to climate change.
news.summary: In both London and New York, Climate X has projected a staggering $800 million in climate-related losses for FIFA World Cup venues by the year 2050. This forecast is based on an in-depth analysis of 37 stadiums.

news.headline: VEON CEO welcomes unfreezing of corporate rights on Kyivstar & Ukrainian subsidiaries by Kyiv court.
news.summary: Amsterdam, Dubai, and Kyiv, 3rd December 2024 - VEON Ltd., a worldwide digital operator trading on Nasdaq under VEON, discloses an open communication from Group CEO Kaan Terzioglu to VEON shareholders concerning the Shevchenkivskyi District Court of Kyiv's recent ruling. The court order has led to the release of VEON's corporate rights on Kyivstar, as well as their other Ukrainian subsidiaries such as Ukraine Tower Company, KyivstarTech, and Helsi.

news.headline: France on the brink of collapse as government faces 'moment of truth'. #France #government #crisis #collapse
Nel ASA's Nel Hydrogen Electrolyser AS gets 10 MW order worth EUR 5 million from Samsung C&T.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway on December 3, 2024, Nel Hydrogen Electrolyser AS, a branch of Nel ASA (Nel, OSE:NEL), has recently finalized a deal with Samsung C&T Corporation Engineering & Construction Group ('Samsung C&T') for the procurement of 10 megawatts worth of alkaline electrolyser equipment. The value of this contract amounts to approximately EUR 5 million.

news.headline: ECB's Cipollone: Europe needs to defend its role in the world economy.
Tencent launches CarbonX Program 2.0 to drive climate tech innovation to achieve net-zero world by 2050.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Beijing, Tencent revealed the introduction of the CarbonX Program 2.0 as part of its efforts to propel advancements in climate technologies for achieving a net-zero world by 2050. This new phase follows the success of the initial program.

news.headline: 21X, a German fintech, receives EU license for tokenization platform with collaborations from Polygon and SBI Digital Markets.
news.summary: 21X is collaborating with multiple partners, such as Polygon and SBI Digital Markets, to develop its blockchain-powered trading platform.

news.headline: Yuga Labs boosts NFT R&D by acquiring Tokenproof team for enhanced Web3 access, strengthening infrastructure.
news.summary: Yuga Labs has bolstered its NFT infrastructure by bringing on Tokenproof’s technical team, with the goal of improving accessibility and utility within the Web3 sector. This move highlights Yuga Labs' commitment to enhancing its technological capabilities in the NFT space.

news.headline: ECB's Cipollone: US tariffs mean lower growth and inflation in Europe.
@ECB's Cipollone: Europe is growing much less than it could.
French bonds present long-term value, covered in a 3-minute market summary.
Earnings scheduled for December 3, 2024: Core & Main $0.66/share, $1.99B revenue; Citi Trends -$0.75/share, $178.48M revenue.
news.summary: Several companies are set to report their quarterly earnings before the bell today:- Core & Main (NYSE:CNM) is expected to announce earnings of $0.66 per share, with a revenue of $1.99 billion.- Citi Trends (NASDAQ:CTRN) may report a quarterly loss of $0.75 per share, generating revenue of $178.48 million.- REX American Resources (NYSE:REX) is anticipated to report earnings of $0.72 per share, with revenue around $159.00 million.- Bank of Nova Scotia (NYSE:BNS) is projected to announce earnings of $1.16 per share, on revenue totaling $6.16 billion.- Donaldson (NYSE:DCI) is also set to release their earnings report.

news.headline: SSV Network's Alan Fork boosts Mainnet performance, cutting CPU usage and enhancing scalability, per SSV Team.
news.summary: A new update named Alan Fork on the SSV Network has resulted in significant enhancements in performance metrics. The update has successfully decreased CPU usage and resource consumption, while also improving node efficiency and scalability. This development signifies a positive impact on the network's operations, ushering in a new era of improved functionality.

news.headline: Elon Musk in the news: Tesla payout denied, SpaceX valuation revealed. #ElonMusk #Tesla #SpaceX
Increase in maximum BFUSD holdings for VIP 0-9 users on Binance Futures starting Dec. 3, 2024. Individual accounts must comply with new trading rules.
news.summary: Starting from December 3, 2024, Binance Futures has raised the BFUSD maximum holding limits for VIP 0 to 9 users. The adjustment impacts individual accounts and mandates adherence to the revised trading regulations.

news.headline: Binance adds USDⓈ-M perpetual contracts to its Futures Copy Trading for users to mirror top traders. Enhances trading options.
news.summary: Binance has recently added USDⓈ-M perpetual contracts to its Futures Copy Trading platform. This update aims to provide more trading options for users interested in mimicking the strategies of successful traders. This addition increases the range of opportunities available for users on the platform.

news.headline: Gartner lists top priorities for CMOs in 2025: bridging strategy with operations, delivering differentiation, and investing in customer journey.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, Gartner, Inc. has outlined three key priorities for Chief Marketing Officers (CMOs) in order to achieve marketing excellence by 2025. These priorities involve: 1) bridging the disconnect between marketing strategy and operations to adapt to disruptions; 2) leading marketing initiatives to create distinctive value across the enterprise; and 3) focusing on customer journey investments to enhance marketing effectiveness. These strategies aim to assist CMOs in navigating the evolving business landscape and driving growth.

news.headline: Hydrogen CEO Hill and UMass expert Niezrecki discuss hydrogen-wind energy synergy and resilience in wind systems.
news.summary: Dr. Christopher Niezrecki provides insights on monitoring the structural health of wind energy systems for enhancing energy resilience.
